mano_cua.result_summary: 测试通过。关闭 Offcanvas 面板后，Navbar.Toggle 控制的折叠导航项保持收起状态，未被意外展开。Offcanvas 关闭操作独立于 Navbar.Toggle 的切换行为，组件隔离正确。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Navigated to Components > Navbars > Offcanvas section, clicked hamburger toggle to open Offcanvas, clicked close button, then observed Navbar state. Nav items remained collapsed after Offcanvas close. Test passes - correct component isolation.
